title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
